name: agentctl-watcher
description: Automatically records agent file actions into a ledger.md blockchain ledger.

agentctl.agentId.description: Agent ID recorded in every ledger block.

agentctl.ledgerPath.description: Absolute path to ledger.md. Defaults to <workspace root>/ledger.md.

agentctl.recordFileSaves.description: Append a block whenever a file is saved.

agentctl.recordFileCreations.description: Append a block whenever a new file is created.

agentctl.recordFileDeletions.description: Append a block whenever a file is deleted.

agentctl.excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to ignore.
